scheduleFields.startsAt: Optional ISO-8601 datetime. Notification is ignored before this time.
scheduleFields.endsAt: Optional ISO-8601 datetime. Notification is ignored after this time.
scheduleFields.showAtLocal: Optional HH:mm local time. Notification is eligible only after this local time each day.
scheduleFields.daysOfWeek: Optional list of local weekday numbers. Monday=1, Sunday=7.
scheduleFields.maxShows: Optional integer. Maximum times this notification can be shown on this device.
scheduleFields.cooldownHours: Optional integer. Minimum hours before showing this same notification again.
scheduleFields.priority: Optional integer. Higher priority notices are shown first.
scheduleFields.showInApp: Optional boolean. If true, show inside Notifications settings/inbox.
scheduleFields.showSystem: Optional boolean. If true, show Android notification-bar notification.

rules: Keep body under 120 characters when possible.
Use one clear action per notification.
Use stable unique IDs. Never reuse an ID for a different notification.
Set enabled to false instead of deleting a notice older app builds may have cached.
Use startsAt and endsAt for campaign windows.
Use showAtLocal for daily time-based notices.
Use cooldownHours to avoid repeating the same notice too often.
Use showSystem=false for notices that should appear only inside the app.
Use release or update only for real GitHub release communication.
Avoid urgent language unless the user must act immediately.
Use remote-config notices, not notification-feed notices, when you need multiple action buttons.

example.title: Short human title
example.body: One calm sentence that explains what changed.
